title: Order in the customer's house standard (context not in the request)
notes: KNOWN GAP CASE (same family as 04): 'w naszym standardzie' resolves only through customer context — this client's standard is the silver (SR) accessory series, which the agent cannot know from the request text. Also requires per-room multiplication (3 rooms × ...) and inferring frame count (one frame per accessory: 12 sockets + 6 switches = 18 single frames). Today the agent will likely pick white variants and miss frames math; measures progress on customer-context awareness. IMPORTANT: the customer name must stay color-neutral — an earlier version named the hotel 'Srebrny Staw' and gpt-5.4-nano inferred the silver series from the name alone, scoring 83% without the capability under test.

customer.name: Hotel Magnolia
customer.profile: Boutique hotel chain. House standard: silver (srebrny) accessory series for all sockets and switches — every past order used the SR variants.

request: Dzień dobry, proszę o osprzęt na 3 pokoje hotelowe w naszym standardzie: na każdy pokój 4 gniazda podwójne i 2 łączniki schodowe, plus ramki pojedyncze do wszystkiego.
